creator: winter@jurai.net
text:
The existing quota tools aren't really at all useful for manageing 
	any large numbers of user/group disk quotas.  A proper tool should be 
	useful from the command line.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.jurai.net/users/winter/setquota.tar.gz

	Set and Get user and group quotas.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try setting the quotas for 1000 new users.  Using edquota.
